next_iteration.recommendation: Use promotion/action/improvement ledgers to schedule the next iteration after governance decides.

notes: This artifact is a closed-loop iteration contract; it does not call graders, trainers, cloud APIs, or benchmarks.
Missing phase inputs keep the loop fail-closed while preserving a schema-checkable plan for orchestration.
Use dry-run/mock provider receipts first; live provider launches must be explicit, credentialed, and separately archived.
objective: Demonstrate a fail-closed closed-loop agentic training iteration contract.

phases.gate: generated tasks must be versioned, replayable, and privacy reviewed before rollout.
phases.name: Scenario and task generation

phases.gate: rollouts must stay inside declared budget and environment descriptors.
phases.name: Rollout collection

phases.gate: evidence must be schema-checkable and traceable before training data selection.
phases.name: Evidence scoring

phases.gate: model-grader labels are blocked until calibration and human override paths exist.
phases.name: Rubric and model-grader review

phases.gate: uncalibrated or low-confidence labels must not enter trainer-ready datasets.
phases.name: Rejection sampling

phases.gate: datasets must be redacted, licensed, hashed, and split before trainer handoff.
phases.name: Dataset curation

phases.gate: live trainer launch requires explicit opt-in, credentials, cloud-provider receipts, and a passing preflight.
phases.name: External trainer execution

phases.gate: trained outputs must pass serving compatibility before held-out evals or promotion.
phases.name: Serving checks

phases.gate: live external benchmarks remain disabled until dependencies and held-out scenario parity pass.
phases.name: Held-out eval and external benchmarks

phases.gate: next work must be evidence-backed, deduplicated, and linked to repair/curriculum signals.
phases.name: Improvement planning

phases.gate: governance must approve, reject, rollback, or request another iteration before aliases move.
phases.name: Governance decision

phases.gate: registry writes are guarded by promotion decisions and rollback receipts.
phases.name: Promotion or rollback

phases.gate: new iterations are scheduled only from ledgered decisions and open repair actions.
phases.name: Next-iteration scheduling
